contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Currency Conversion flow — multi-currency double-entry on managed AGL ledgers
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/225
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/274
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/108
  
  Details:
  Designed and shipped a new end-to-end flow that generalises Gary's manual USD↔BRL/Wise/Rendimento bookkeeping across managed AGL ledgers. First concrete consumer is the upcoming TRIBO_MIRIM_BAHIA managed ledger (Tribo Mirim Bahia capoeira platform donation flow), but the page applies to every managed ledger Gary already does FX conversions against.
  
  Architecture mirrors the existing Capital Injection processor exactly (same intake-tab pattern, signature validation, managed-ledger validation via Shipment Ledger Listing, idempotency on (telegram_update_id, telegram_message_id)) but extends the double-entry to TWO different currencies: -source_amount source-ccy debit + +target_amount target-ccy credit, both Category=Assets. Multi-currency Balance aggregates resolve correctly via SUM(amount) GROUP BY currency, matching tdg_expenses_processing.gs's signed-amount convention.
  
  Shipped:
  - dapp/currency_conversion.html — signature gate, managed-ledger picker, source/target currency+amount inputs with live implied-FX rate display, Wise/Rendimento receipt upload (paste-area + camera), signed [CURRENCY CONVERSION EVENT] POST to Edgar. Plus dapp/menu.js entry, service-worker.js cache bump (v8→v9), menu.js?v= bumped across all 32 HTML pages.
  - tokenomics/google_app_scripts/tdg_asset_management/currency_conversion_processing.gs (477 LOC) — scans Telegram Chat Logs for [CURRENCY CONVERSION EVENT], intakes to a new Currency Conversion tab (Status NEW→PROCESSED), then writes the source-debit+target-credit pair into the target managed ledger's Transactions tab. Reuses helpers from capital_injection_processing.gs.
  - tokenomics/.../CURRENCY_CONVERSION_IMPLEMENTATION.md — companion playbook (flow, schema, tests, one-time deployment steps).
  - tokenomics/SCHEMA.md — new Currency Conversion tab section (14 columns A-N).
  - agentic_ai_context updates: PROJECT_INDEX.md (dapp row), NOTES_dapp.md (Common Flows + key files), NOTES_tokenomics.md (Google Apps Scripts pairing CapitalInjection ↔ CurrencyConversion as twin double-entry intake patterns).
  
  Used a git worktree off main for the tokenomics commit because the active local branch was feature/asset-receipt-gas with substantial unrelated in-flight work (per the worktree-for-parallel-sessions guidance in memory).
  
  Pending operator deployment steps (called out in the IMPLEMENTATION doc): create the Currency Conversion tab on the Telegram & Submissions sheet, paste the GAS into the existing Apps Script project that hosts capital_injection_processing.gs, add a 10-min time-driven trigger.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
